executionTimeBreakdown.description: Breakdown of execution time for the operator, e.g., time spent in different phases of execution.

operatorAttributes.description: Attributes of the operator, e.g., the number of rows returned by the operator.

operatorStatistics.description: Statistics for the operator, e.g., number of rows processed, CPU time, etc.

operatorType.description: Type of the operator, e.g., SELECT, INSERT, etc.

parentOperators.description: IDs of the parent operators, e.g., the ID of the parent SELECT operator for a SELECT operator in a subquery.
